title: Love After Midnight
content: Neither Emma nor Noah could sleep after returning from a friend's birthday party. Just after midnight, Noah suggested taking a walk through the quiet streets. The city looked completely different without the usual crowds and traffic. They spoke honestly about their fears, dreams, and hopes for the future. Under the soft glow of streetlights, the conversation became deeper than either had expected. By the time they returned home, they understood that sometimes the most meaningful moments happen long after everyone else has gone to bed.
